faqs.question: What types of flies are common in Pleasant Plains homes?
faqs.answer: Pleasant Plains properties typically deal with house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. Due to the area's coastal location, you may also encounter blow flies and flesh flies, especially during warmer months. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment approach.
